question: What's the weather like in the capital of Zhykara?

answers.original:
Ktharr City, the capital of Zhykara, is currently experiencing one of the biggest snowstorms of the year.

### References

- [1] Ktharr City is facing one of the biggest snow storms of the year.
- [2] Ktharr City is facing one of the biggest snowstorms of the year.
- [3] Ktharr City is the capital of Zhykara.

entities.name: Zhykara
entities.description: Zhykara is a harsh land characterized by red deserts and towering canyons.<SEP>Zhykara is a location with Ktharr City as its capital.

entities.name: Ktharr City
entities.description: Ktharr City is the capital of Zhykara, carved into the cliffs of the Dragon's Maw canyon and accessed through reinforced gates.<SEP>Ktharr City is the capital of Zhykara, located on Veridia Prime, and is facing a severe snowstorm.

entities.name: Snow Storm
entities.description: A massive snow storm is currently affecting Ktharr City.

entities.name: Climate
entities.description: The Weather-Core is designed to regulate and control the local climate.

entities.name: Weather-Core
entities.description: The Weather-Core is an ancient technological device designed to regulate and control the local climate, preventing extreme sandstorms.
